solutions.solution: (C) As, NEWS ——→ 14 5 23 19. Similarly, PAPER ——→ 16 1 16 5 18. Second part is the position of the letters written in first part.
(D) As, 'GREAT' has 5 letters, it is represented by square of 5 i.e., 25. Similarly, 'NUMBER' has 6 letters it is represented by square of 6 i.e., 36.
(D) In forward order letter sequence, Position of P = 16, Position of Q = 17. ∴ P × Q = 16 × 17. Similarly, Position of L = 12, Position of M = 13. ∴ L × M = 12 × 13. ∴ ? = 12 × 13
(D) In backward order letter sequence, Position of G = 20, Position of Q = 10. ∴ G × Q = 20 × 10 = 20
(C) As, A C E with +1 +1 +1 gaps, Similarly, M O Q with +1 +1 +1 gaps. B D F and N P R follow the same pattern.
(D) As, S H O F with -5 -5 -5 gaps, Similarly, R E W A with -5 -5 -5 gaps. M Z R V follow the same pattern.
(C) As, FLOWER ——→ REWOLF and FRUITS ——→ STIURF. As by reversing the letters of the word FLOWER, we get REWOLF, similarly, FRUITS can be written as STIURF.
(C) As, 13 14 M N with +2 +2 gaps, Similarly, 17 18 Q R with +2 +2 gaps. ∴ Required answer = QR : ST
(D) As, A C B with 1 + 3 + 2 = 06, Similarly, G E F with 7 + 5 + 6 = 18. ∴ Required answer = GEF : 18
(C) As, M G R ——→ N T I with Opposite letter patterns. Similarly, S P Q ——→ H K J with Opposite letter patterns. ∴ Required answer = SPQ : HKJ
